title: Chunky Optimizations
description: Modpack focused on optimizing chunk generation, reducing stutter and boosting overall fps
body:
## Chunky Optimizations is a lightweight optimization modpack designed to _make **minecraft** smoother than ever._ 

It outperforms other optimization modpacks and if it doesn’t, I research and update it until it does. For the best performence Chunky Optimizations has little to no quality of life mods.
‎ 
‎ 
‎
‎ 
### Chunky Optimizations is focused on improving:
 - Rendering & chunk loading
 - Reduced stutter
 - GUI optimization
 - Light & block rendering
 - Entity logic
 - Overall Fps
‎ 
‎ 
‎ 

# Screenshots:


### 1.21 Maxed out settings
‎

### Chunky Optimizations

![chunky optimizations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ee98c576d77c6872aa14dc490ad74bed0e166ca.png)

‎
<details>
<summary>Why does it show fabric in the vanilla screenshot</summary>

I have to use the mod "Cubes Without Borders" otherwise it would limit my fps to 60

</details>
‎ 
 
‎ 
> Chunky Optimizations was created to not only focus on rendering like other optimizations modpacks it was created to improve _everything_
